hooks.command: bash skills/aws-troubleshooting/examples/investigate-lambda.sh ${FUNCTION_NAME:-my-function} 2>/dev/null | tail -20 || echo 'AWS troubleshooting script executed'
bash skills/eks-troubleshooting/examples/investigate-deployment.sh ${DEPLOYMENT:-my-deployment} 2>/dev/null | tail -20 || echo 'EKS troubleshooting script executed'
bash skills/datadog-troubleshooting/examples/investigate-service.sh 2>/dev/null | tail -20 || echo 'Datadog troubleshooting script executed'
